summary: The diff fully implements all four requirements from the BuildRequest. The landing page is complete with header, hero section, about section, and footer. The warm earth tone color palette (terracotta, sage green, cream) is consistently applied through CSS custom properties. Navigation is functional with smooth scrolling and responsive mobile menu. The about section provides introductory content with three feature cards. No missing requirements or hallucinated features detected.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer component with caffeine.ai attribution and UTM tracking
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly excludes backend functionality and does not request a footer. The Footer component was added without being requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication hooks and providers
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly states as a non-goal: 'User authentication or login system'. However, useInternetIdentity hooks and InternetIdentityProvider were implemented.
The BuildRequest specifies warm earth tones but does not request dark mode support. The CSS includes a complete dark mode theme that was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Two different index.css files with conflicting color systems
hallucinated_features.reason: Both frontend/src/index.css and frontend/index.css exist. The src version implements the requested earth tones, while the root version uses a generic grayscale palette. This duplication was not requested.
